title: glechoma rugosa
intro: Glechoma rugosa, also known as Russian sage, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of Glechoma rugosa include its potential to alleviate symptoms of indigestion, reduce fever, and promote wound healing. Glechoma rugosa can be prepared in various forms, such as tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to support overall well-being.
